label: Protein Structure Prediction
description: Predict protein structures using Boltz-2, Chai-1, AlphaFold 2, or ESMFold. Provides a unified interface with automatic parameter mapping, format conversion, and optional MSA generation.

parameters.label: Prediction Tool
parameters.desc: Structure prediction engine to use. ESMFold is fastest (single-sequence, no MSA). Boltz-2 and Chai-1 are diffusion-based with highest accuracy. AlphaFold 2 uses co-evolutionary features.

parameters.label: Input File
parameters.desc: Protein sequence in FASTA format (.fasta, .fa). Boltz also accepts YAML for full feature support (ligands, constraints).

parameters.label: MSA Mode
parameters.desc: Multiple Sequence Alignment strategy. 'none' for single-sequence (ESMFold default). 'server' to generate MSA via ColabFold MMseqs2. 'upload' to provide pre-computed MSA file.

parameters.label: MSA File
parameters.desc: Pre-computed MSA file (.a3m, .sto). Required when msa_mode is 'upload'. Auto-converted to tool-native format.

parameters.label: Number of Samples
parameters.desc: Number of structure samples to generate (Boltz, Chai only). More samples give diversity at the cost of runtime.

parameters.label: Recycling Steps
parameters.desc: Number of recycling iterations for refinement. Maps to tool-specific recycling parameters.

parameters.label: Random Seed
parameters.desc: Random seed for reproducibility (Chai, AlphaFold only).

parameters.label: Output Format
parameters.desc: Primary structure output format. Both PDB and mmCIF are always generated; this controls which is primary.

parameters.label: Output File
parameters.desc: Optional output file path (not used — outputs go to output_path folder).
